zh.lifeSummary: 當Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III於1055年之後出生在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文時，他的父親Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel8979歲，母親Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe8977歲。他於大約1090年與Gertrude de Flandre結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1095年2月5日在比利時迪瑟 德 圖爾奈，埋葬在比利時布拉班特 瓦隆尼維勒斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III于1055年之后出生在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文时，他的父亲Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel8979岁，母亲Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe8977岁。他于大约1090年与Gertrude de Flandre结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1095年2月5日在比利时迪瑟 德 圖爾奈，埋葬在比利时布拉班特 瓦隆尼維勒斯。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Hendrik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III was born after 1055, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, his father, Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel, was 8979 and his mother, Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe, was 8977. He married Gertrude de Flandre about 1090. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 5 February 1095, in Tournai, Belgium, and was buried in Nivelles, Walloon Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III est né après 1055, à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, son père, Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel, avait 8979 ans et sa mère, Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe, avait 8977 ans. Il a épousé Gertrude de Flandre environ 1090. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 février 1095, à Diocèse de Tournai, Belgique, et a été enterré à Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III nach 1055 in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel 8979 und seine Mutter Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe 8977. Er hat um 1090 Gertrude de Flandre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Februar 1095 in Bistum Tournai, Belgien und wurde in Nivelles, Wallonisch Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III è nato il dopo il 1055 nel Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, il suo padre, Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel, aveva 8979 anni e il suo madre, Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe, aveva 8977 anni. Lui sposato Gertrude de Flandre circa 1090. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 5 febbraio 1095, nel Diocèse de Tournai, Belgio, e fu sepolto a Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel IIIが1055年以後にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンで生まれた時，父Hendrik II van Leuven-Brusselは8979歳，母Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuweは8977歳であった。約1090年にGertrude de Flandreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1095年2月5日にベルギーディオクeゼ ド トウルナイで死去し，ベルギーブラバント ワロンニベレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III(이)가 1055년 이후 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel(은)는 8979세였고, 그의 어머니 Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe(은)는 8977세였다. 그는 대략 1090년 Gertrude de Flandre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1095년 2월 5일 벨기에 디오ce스 데 토우른아이에서 사망했으며 벨기에 브라반트 월런 니벨레스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III nasceu após 1055, em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, seu pai, Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel, tinha 8979 anos e sua mãe, Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe, tinha 8977 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertrude de Flandre aproximadamente 1090. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1095, em Diocèse de Tournai, Bélgica, e foi sepultado em Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III родился после 1055 г. в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel было 8979 лет, а матери, которую звали Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe, 8977. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrude de Flandre около 1090 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 5 февраля 1095 г. в местности диокeс де тоурнеи, Бельгия и был похоронен в местности нивеллесь, брабант валлон, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III nació después de 1055, en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, su papá, Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel, tenía 8979 años y su mamá, Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe, tenía 8977 años. Se casó con Gertrude de Flandre aproximadamente 1090. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de febrero de 1095, en Diocèse de Tournai, Bélgica, y fue sepultado en Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Bélgica.
